title: angorkis spathulata
intro: Angorkis spathulata, also known as Angiopteris palmatopedata, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Marattiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Angorkis spathulata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and protect against various infections. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried or extracted to produce a powder or tea that can be used to treat various health conditions.
